itinerary.title: Premium Mizoram Adventure Tour
itinerary.tagline: Aizawl • Phawngpui Blue Mountain Trek • High-Altitude Exploration • Wilderness Adventure
itinerary.overview:
TRAGUIN PREMIUM MIZORAM ADVENTURE TOUR — Aizawl • Phawngpui Blue Mountain Trek • High-Altitude Exploration • Wilderness Adventure. 06 Nights / 07 Days High-Altitude Mizoram Adventure Expedition.

TOUR OVERVIEW
Conquer the heights of Mizoram's most famous peak with our TRAGUIN curated Blue Mountain Trekking Expedition. Designed for serious adventure seekers, this high-altitude itinerary pushes boundaries, offering a rugged experience into the clouds of Northeast India's pristine mountain wilderness, ensuring unforgettable memories.
itinerary.seo_title: MZ-009 | Premium Mizoram Adventure Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 06 Nights / 07 Days Mizoram package (MZ-009 / TRG-MIZ-BLU-2026): Aizawl • Phawngpui Blue Mountain Trek • High-Altitude Exploration • Wilderness Adventure with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: Day 01: ARRIVAL IN AIZAWL & EXPEDITION BRIEFING
Day 04: SUMMIT REACH & PANORAMIC CLOUD VISTAS
TRAGUIN curated Premium Mizoram Adventure Tour with handpicked premium stays
Vehicle / Meals: Luxury SUV / MAPAI (Breakfast & Dinner)

days.title: ARRIVAL IN AIZAWL & EXPEDITION BRIEFING
days.description: Arrive in Aizawl. Private transfer to your expedition basecamp. Gear check and detailed route briefing for your Blue Mountain trek.
activities: Gear check and Blue Mountain trek route briefing.

days.title: TRANSIT TO MOUNTAIN BASE
days.description: Drive through stunning valleys to the base of Phawngpui (Blue Mountain). Camp in the wild, surrounded by natural beauty.
activities: Wild camping surrounded by natural beauty.

days.title: BLUE MOUNTAIN TREKKING COMMENCEMENT
days.description: Begin the ascent toward Phawngpui peak. Navigate through dense mountain forests and observe rare, high-altitude flora and mountain wildlife.
activities: Dense mountain forests and high-altitude flora.

days.title: SUMMIT REACH & PANORAMIC CLOUD VISTAS
days.description: Conquer the summit of Phawngpui. Witness the breathtaking landscapes above the clouds, a truly unmatched exclusive experience.
activities: Summit of Phawngpui — landscapes above the clouds.

days.title: DESCENT & WILDERNESS EXPLORATION
days.description: Descend from the peak with a guided exploration of remote ridge-line trails, capturing stunning photography points in the wilderness.
activities: Descent with guided ridge-line trail exploration.

days.title: RETURN TO AIZAWL & CELEBRATION
days.description: Return to Aizawl. Reflect on your adventure during a final celebratory dinner party, creating unforgettable memories.
activities: Meals Included: MAPAI Breakfast & Celebration Dinner

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer to the airport, completing your premium adventure expedition.

inclusions.text: Premium Stays: 6 Nights in handpicked Mizoram properties as per chosen category.
Luxury Transportation: Private dedicated Luxury SUV for all transfers and sightseeing.
Curated Meal Plan: MAPAI — daily breakfast and dinner at handpicked venues.
TRAGUIN Support: 24/7 dedicated guest experience manager on call.
Private Transfers: Airport/railway arrival and departure transfers in premium AC vehicle.
Handpicked Stays: TRAGUIN-vetted accommodations matching your selected tier.
All applicable taxes, driver allowances, tolls, and parking charges for the private vehicle.
High-altitude trekking expedition to Phawngpui Blue Mountain with gear check and route briefing.
Airfare, domestic flight bookings, or train tickets.
Monument entry tickets, camera permits, or sanctuary entry fees.
Personal expenses such as laundry, phone calls, drinks, and tips.
Travel insurance, medical expenses, and any emergency evacuation costs.
